imagemagick.description: Image processing backend for the photo agent. Exposes convert, identify, composite, mogrify, and montage as mcp__imagemagick__* tools. Requires ImageMagick 7+ installed on PATH.

browser.description: Playwright browser backend for the researcher agent. Exposes navigate, screenshot, get_page_text, find, click, and form_input as mcp__browser__* tools. Playwright will download Chromium on first run.
